title: Delicious Yautia Tacos
description: A flavorful and colorful dish that combines the natural sweetness of yautia with the vibrant flavors of Mexican cuisine.
instructions: 1. Peel the yautia roots and grate them into a large bowl.
2. Heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat and sauté the yautia for 5 minutes.
3. Warm the tacos shells according to package instructions.
4. In a separate pan, melt the Mexican silky cheese over low heat.
5. Assemble the tacos by spooning the yautia mixture onto the warmed shells, followed by a sprinkle of avocado, a drizzle of lime juice, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
